main.description: Records that the user has opened/read a feed entry (subject AT-URI). Repo records are public by default; store only the subject URI and timestamps—no titles, URLs, or other duplicated content. Clients should use a deterministic record key derived from the subject URI (see Social Wire client conventions).

subjectUri.description: The site.standard.entry (or other) AT-URI for the article.

readAt.description: ISO 8601 time when the user first marked this entry as read in this client.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 time when this record was last written (optional; defaults to readAt when absent).
